curation_notes: Patch commit a134e06 fixes two functions that had swapped length and capacity arguments in Vec::from_raw_parts(). Locations derived directly from the patch diff: guarded_transmute_vec_permissive in src/lib.rs and guarded_transmute_to_bytes_vec in src/to_bytes.rs. Both are the only non-test source files changed. The advisory description confirms the swapped-arguments mechanism.
